creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
@koobs, why are you add merge-quarterly flag?

There is no reason, moreover it's not a bug (at least for me). In comment #1 I explained how to reduce www/webkit2-gtk3 dependency. Options by default and some dependencies (especially devel/gvfs, desktop/xfce4-tumbler) in x11-fm/thunar are just for UX.
